backend/main.mo: Defines the main canister with data models for users, posts, comments, tickets, messaging, and marketplace plus storage, authorization, and state maps.
backend/migration.mo: Provides type mappings and migration logic from old actor state structures to updated data models including comments with parentComment.
feature_evidence.json: Lists implemented features with associated source files, components, and requirement IDs for validation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains human-written summaries for many frontend files describing their roles in the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base styles and color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell that loads the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with all app routes and wraps authenticated users in the main layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Simple admin-access error screen with icon, message, and button to return home.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Renders the main admin dashboard with tabs for managing different platform sections. Loads and displays each corresponding panel component.
Checks admin authentication before rendering children, showing a loader or access denied screen when appropriate.
frontend/src/components/admin/panels/Adm: Provides UI for listing admins and granting or revoking admin roles, restricted to super admins. Includes dialogs and toast feedback for role changes.
frontend/src/components/admin/panels/Con: Lists user conversations with pagination and allows viewing messages in a dialog. Fetches participant profiles and message history for each conversation.
frontend/src/components/admin/panels/Mar: Displays marketplace listings with options to mark items as sold or delete them. Shows seller info, timestamps, media, and includes confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/panels/Not: Static panel explaining that notifications are managed per user via the Users panel.
frontend/src/components/admin/panels/Pos: Lists posts with pagination and allows admins to delete posts. Shows author info, content, media, and metadata.
frontend/src/components/admin/panels/Rep: Placeholder panel indicating that report management is not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/panels/Sup: Checks Supabase environment configuration, initialization, and connection status and provides UI feedback with a test-connection feature.
frontend/src/components/admin/panels/Tic: Fetches and paginates ticket events, rendering event details with creator info and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/admin/panels/Use: Displays all user profiles with avatars and metadata, handling loading and error states.
Renders a sign‑out button for authenticated users and clears identity and query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Gates content behind Internet Identity authentication and triggers profile setup when needed.
frontend/src/components/auth/SignedOutLa: Landing page for signed‑out users with branding and login actions through Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/comments/Comment: Renders comment threads with replies, timestamps, and actions for adding or deleting comments.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app layout with sidebar navigation, mobile nav, and routed content area.
frontend/src/components/nav/PrimaryNav.t: Provides desktop and mobile navigation with dynamic badges and admin‑only links based on user state.
frontend/src/components/posts/PostCard.t: Displays a post with author info, media, timestamp formatting, and like interactions, navigating to the post on click.
frontend/src/components/posts/PostCompos: Provides a UI to create posts with text and optional media upload, handling validation and upload progress.
frontend/src/components/profile/AvatarUp: Handles avatar image selection, preview, and upload, validating file type and size.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileH: Renders a user's profile header with avatar, basic info, bio, and follower placeholders.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileS: A modal for onboarding users to set up profile details including avatar, names, university, and bio.
frontend/src/constants/universities.ts: Exports a constant list of supported universities and its TypeScript type.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance based on identity, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Checks whether the current caller is an admin using the backend actor and exposes loading/error state.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminQueries.ts: Admin-focused React Query hooks for listing and mutating users, posts, comments, marketplace items, and events with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, including login state and stored identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Hooks to fetch notifications, unread counts, and poll for new notifications using React Query and actor calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Main user-facing React Query hooks for profiles, posts, comments, marketplace, notifications, tickets, and media with mutations and cache updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light/dark theme variables and base styles.
frontend/src/lib/supabaseClient.ts: Lazy initializer for an optional Supabase client, safely handling missing package installation.
frontend/src/lib/superAdmin.ts: Utility for determining super admin status, currently returning true for any admin.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a helper to merge class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React, query client, Internet Identity provider, and global styles.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPage.tsx: Wraps the admin dashboard in an access gate component.
frontend/src/pages/BookmarksPage.tsx: Static page displaying a bookmarks header and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/pages/ConversationPage.tsx: Displays a conversation thread, loads messages, shows the other participant, and allows sending new messages.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Provides user search with university filters and displays matching user profiles.
frontend/src/pages/HomeFeedPage.tsx: Shows the user's home feed with tabs for following, campus, and universal posts, including post creation.
frontend/src/pages/ListingDetailPage.tsx: Shows detailed information for a marketplace listing, including images, description, seller info, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Provides listing search and a modal to create new listings with optional images.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.tsx: Lists user conversations and supports starting new conversations through a user search dialog.
frontend/src/pages/NotificationsPage.tsx: Displays a list of notifications with icons, timestamps, and navigation behavior for each notification type.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetailPage.tsx: Shows a single post with author details, media, comments, and supports adding new comments.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Loads and displays the current user's profile with tabbed sections for posts, replies, and media.
frontend/src/pages/TicketEventDetailPage: Shows event details, lists issued tickets, and allows issuing new tickets via a dialog.
frontend/src/pages/TicketMarketplaceEven: Displays public event details and lets users purchase tickets if available.
frontend/src/pages/TicketMarketplacePage: Lists ticketed events with university filtering and navigation to event detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/TicketsPage.tsx: UI for browsing, creating, verifying, and checking in ticketed events using query hooks and dialogs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Helpers for reading URL params, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning hash parameters.
frontend/src/vite-env.d.ts: Type definitions for Vite environment variables.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, layout, typography, and animations.
project_state.json: Metadata describing project scope, architecture notes, features, and known issues.
